node.title: Uber interview experience - OA and Phone screen round

article.title: Uber interview experience - OA and Phone screen round
article.content:
I had applied for L4 opening in Uber. After a few days, I received a mail with an OA link to be completed within 2 days. Completed the OA, and was invited for an in person hiring drive in Uber Bangalore office.

Online Assessment - 
2 Leetcode medium level questions.
One of them was similar to https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-edge-reversals-so-every-node-is-reachable/description/?envType=company&envId=microsoft&favoriteSlug=microsoft-six-months 

The other I don't remember.

Screening round -
You are given an undirected tree. You have to find the minimum time taken to burn the entire tree. You can start a fire from any node. From one node, the fire splits to all its adjacent nodes in 1 time unit.

Decision: Rejected

post.content: I was asked the same question in OA
I had my screening round on thurs but didn\'t hear back from recruiter about pass/fail yet. How did you get to know the result?
they gave you feedBack on the same day
do we need to print the node as well or just the time?\nand the answer should be diameter of the tree/2 right?
